name: Sinjia Land Limited
summary: Sinjia Land Limited, an investment holding company, operates and manages lodging and boarding houses, and backpackers hostels in Singapore, Thailand, and the United States. It also invests in fund management business. The company was formerly known as HLN Technologies Limited and changed its name to Sinjia Land Limited in April 2013. Sinjia Land Limited was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Singapore.
